nodes.name: lib.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for normalize.ts and seq-features.ts covering normalize, fingerStates, inSameGroup, classifyRule, palmFacingCamera, locationLabel, normalizeSequence, COLLISION_GROUPS, and PATTERNS.

nodes.name: parity.test.ts
nodes.summary: Python/JavaScript parity test for normalize() by comparing normalized landmark output against precomputed samples from a JSON file.

nodes.name: [letter]/page.tsx
nodes.summary: Fingerspelling letter practice page with webcam, MediaPipe hand tracking, ONNX ML model inference, rule-based fallback classifier, and J/Z temporal model for motion letters.

nodes.name: fingerspelling/page.tsx
nodes.summary: Letter selection page listing all ASL fingerspelling letters with static/motion filter.

nodes.name: settings/page.tsx
nodes.summary: Settings page with mirror toggle, handedness toggle, and advanced beta feature placeholders.

nodes.name: [slug]/page.tsx
nodes.summary: Dynamic sign practice page with webcam, MediaPipe, ONNX transformer model for 8 ML-enabled signs, and reference-only view for vocabulary signs.

nodes.name: words/page.tsx
nodes.summary: Vocabulary browsing page with search, category filtering, and grouped card layout for 200 signs.

nodes.name: practice/page.tsx
nodes.summary: Spaced repetition practice page showing review queue, progress stats, and links to all fingerspelling letters and dynamic signs.

nodes.name: setup/page.tsx
nodes.summary: 4-step setup wizard for language selection, camera permission, lighting check, and framing/handedness configuration.

nodes.name: curriculum.ts
nodes.summary: Defines STATIC_LETTERS, MOTION_LETTERS, DYNAMIC_SIGNS, curriculum data (CURRICULUM), letter descriptions, sign descriptions, and ASL reference image URLs.

nodes.name: loadExternals.ts
nodes.summary: Dynamic script loader for MediaPipe Hands, drawing utils, camera utils, and ONNX Runtime Web from CDN with caching via module-level promises.

nodes.name: normalize.ts
nodes.summary: Hand landmark normalization utilities: zero-center wrist, scale by middle-MCP distance, finger extension detection, rule-based classifier, palm-facing detection, location labeling, and movement tracking.

nodes.name: seq-features.ts
nodes.summary: Temporal sequence normalization for landmark buffers: zero-center on first-frame wrist, scale, and compute velocities; supports variable-length and fixed-length (J/Z) pipelines.

nodes.name: storage.ts
nodes.summary: LocalStorage persistence for user preferences and FSRS-based spaced repetition progress tracking with attempt recording and review queue generation.

nodes.name: vocabulary_200.ts
nodes.summary: Vocabulary data module containing 200 ASL sign entries with metadata, helper functions for search/filter, and category definitions.

nodes.name: normalize suite
nodes.summary: Tests normalize() output type, zero-centering, and scale invariance.

nodes.name: fingerStates suite
nodes.summary: Tests fingerStates returns all five finger keys.

nodes.name: classifyRule suite
nodes.summary: Tests classifyRule returns ranked results and finger states.

nodes.name: palmFacingCamera suite
nodes.summary: Tests palmFacingCamera returns facing boolean and magnitude.

nodes.name: locationLabel suite
nodes.summary: Tests locationLabel returns upper/middle/lower based on wrist y position.

nodes.name: normalizeSequence suite
nodes.summary: Tests normalizeSequence output shape, zero-centering, and velocity computation.

nodes.name: COLLISION_GROUPS suite
nodes.summary: Tests COLLISION_GROUPS contains expected letter groupings.

nodes.name: PATTERNS suite
nodes.summary: Tests PATTERNS covers all STATIC_LETTERS with correct finger keys.

nodes.name: normalize() JS↔Python parity suite
nodes.summary: Parameterized parity test checking normalize() output against Python-generated samples.

nodes.name: chooseTip
nodes.summary: Generates contextual feedback tip based on component scores, top prediction, target letter, orientation, and rule-based finger states.

nodes.name: FingerspellingLetterPage
nodes.summary: Main fingerspelling practice page component with webcam loop, ML inference, rule-based classification, J/Z temporal model, and real-time per-finger feedback.

nodes.name: FingerspellingPage
nodes.summary: Letter selection page component rendering filterable grid of ASL fingerspelling letters with static/motion badges.

nodes.name: Toggle
nodes.summary: Reusable toggle switch component with label, description, and disabled state.

nodes.name: SettingsPage
nodes.summary: Settings page component for mirror, handedness toggles and advanced beta feature placeholders.

nodes.name: computeTip
nodes.summary: Generates feedback tip HTML string based on verdict, top result, and target sign.

nodes.name: DynamicSignPage
nodes.summary: Dynamic sign practice page with webcam, transformer model inference, recording mode, and reference-only view for non-ML signs.

nodes.name: WordsPage
nodes.summary: Vocabulary browsing page with search, category filter, and sign card grid with ML badges.

nodes.name: PracticePage
nodes.summary: Spaced repetition review dashboard with stats, progress bar, due queue, and all-signs overview.

nodes.name: SetupPage
nodes.summary: 4-step setup wizard component for language, camera, lighting, and framing configuration.

nodes.name: getStaticLetter
nodes.summary: Looks up a static letter by name from the CURRICULUM array.

nodes.name: getDynamicSign
nodes.summary: Looks up a dynamic sign by slug from the CURRICULUM array.

nodes.name: loadScript
nodes.summary: Dynamically loads a script tag with timeout and deduplication.

nodes.name: loadMediaPipe
nodes.summary: Loads MediaPipe Hands, drawing utils, and camera utils from CDN via script tags.

nodes.name: loadONNX
nodes.summary: Loads ONNX Runtime Web from CDN via script tag.

nodes.name: normalize
nodes.summary: Zero-centers landmarks on wrist and scales by wrist-to-middle-MCP distance.

nodes.name: fingerExtended
nodes.summary: Determines if a finger is extended by comparing tip-to-wrist vs pip-to-wrist distances.

nodes.name: thumbExtended
nodes.summary: Determines if thumb is extended by comparing thumb tip to wrist vs PIP to wrist.

nodes.name: fingerStates
nodes.summary: Returns boolean extension state for all five fingers.

nodes.name: inSameGroup
nodes.summary: Checks if two letters belong to the same collision group for disambiguation.

nodes.name: scoreLetterRule
nodes.summary: Computes agreement score between detected finger states and a target letter pattern.

nodes.name: classifyRule
nodes.summary: Rule-based classifier that scores all letter patterns against detected finger states and returns ranked predictions.

nodes.name: palmFacingCamera
nodes.summary: Determines if palm is facing the camera using cross product of index-MCP and pinky-MCP vectors.

nodes.name: locationLabel
nodes.summary: Returns upper/middle/lower label based on wrist y-coordinate.

nodes.name: recentMovement
nodes.summary: Computes total movement distance over recent wrist positions.

nodes.name: normalizeSequence
nodes.summary: Normalizes a variable-length landmark buffer: zero-centers on first-frame wrist, scales, appends velocities.

nodes.name: normalizeSequenceFixed
nodes.summary: Normalizes and pads/trims a landmark buffer to a fixed target length for J/Z temporal model input.

nodes.name: loadPrefs
nodes.summary: Loads user preferences from localStorage with SSR-safe defaults.

nodes.name: loadProgress
nodes.summary: Loads spaced repetition progress from localStorage.

nodes.name: saveProgress
nodes.summary: Persists spaced repetition progress to localStorage.

nodes.name: recordAttempt
nodes.summary: Records a practice attempt and updates FSRS-like spaced repetition state (stability, difficulty, state transitions).

nodes.name: getReviewQueue
nodes.summary: Returns sorted list of sign IDs due for review, with untried signs appended.

nodes.name: searchSigns
nodes.summary: Searches VOCABULARY_200 by gloss, description, or category substring match.

nodes.name: getSignById
nodes.summary: Looks up a sign entry by its unique id from VOCABULARY_200.

nodes.label: impeccable/
observations: Root directory of the impeccables UI craft skill
Contains agents/, scripts/, reference/ subdirectories
Skill descriptor at SKILL.md registers 22 commands across Build, Evaluate, Refine, Enhance, Fix, Iterate categories
nodes.name: impeccable-skills-root

nodes.label: SKILL.md
observations: Skill descriptor and routing hub for the impeccable skill
Total lines: 168, non-empty lines: 146

Defines 22 sub-commands: craft, shape, teach, document, extract, critique, audit, polish, bolder, quieter, distill, harden, onboard, animate, colorize, typeset, layout, delight, overdrive, clarify, adapt, optimize, live
Shares 8 design laws: color (OKLCH), theme scene sentence, typography 65-75ch, layout, motion bans, absolute bans (side-stripe borders, gradient text, glassmorphism), AI slop test
References registers: brand.md and product.md for register-specific rules
Houses shared design laws including color strategy, theme, typography, layout, motion, and absolute bans
nodes.name: SKILL.md

nodes.label: impeccable-asset-producer.md
observations: Agent: Asset production for impeccability craft
Total lines: 101, agents/impeccable-asset-producer.md
Goal: production cleanup of raster assets from approved mocks, no new art direction
Core rule: preserve visual role, silhouette, palette, lighting, material, texture, camera angle
Input contract: approved mock path, crops, output directory, dimensions, format, transparency needs
Three buckets: produce (needs generation), direct (can ship as crop), semantic (HTML/CSS/SVG)
Output: manifest grouped by produce/direct/semantic with qa_status
Uses imagegen skill for production, prefers true alpha transparency
Contrasts: removes UI text, nav, buttons; preserves only physical marks if parent specifies
nodes.name: impeccable-asset-producer.md

nodes.label: impeccable-paths.mjs
observations: Script: Path resolution utilities for impeccability
Total lines: 110, scripts/impeccable-paths.mjs
Node.js ESM module with exports
Exports constants: IMPECCABLE_DIR, LIVE_DIR, CRITIQUE_DIR
Provides path helpers for: design sidecar, live config, live server info, sessions, annotations, critique dirs
Supports legacy fallback paths (.impeccable-live/)
Used by live.mjs and other scripts for consistent directory resolution
nodes.name: impeccable-paths.mjs

nodes.label: live-accept.mjs
observations: Script: Variant accept/discard CLI for live sessions
Total lines: 595, scripts/live-accept.mjs
Node.js ESM module with auto-execute on direct run
Two modes: --discard removes variants and restores original; --variant N accepts one variant
Handles HTML, JSX, TSX, Vue, Svelte, Astro file extensions
Deep div-depth tracking for accurate JSX wrapper expansion (expandReplaceRange)
Carbonize support: preserves colocated <style> blocks with markers for background CSS integration
Exports: findMarkerBlock, extractOriginal, extractVariant, extractCss, deindentContent, detectCommentSyntax
Falls back to agent-driven flow if session markers live in a generated file
Imports is-generated.mjs for generated file detection
nodes.name: live-accept.mjs

nodes.label: live-wrap.mjs
observations: Script: Element wrapping CLI for live variant sessions
Total lines: 632, scripts/live-wrap.mjs
Node.js ESM module with auto-execute on direct run
Searches project files by query (ID, class combo, tag, text snippet) to find elements
Wraps found element with variant scaffolding (original + variant slots)
Generates different wrapper syntax for HTML vs JSX/TSX files
Ambiguity detection: when multiple elements match, filters by textContent
Detects comment syntax (HTML vs JSX) and style mode (scoped vs Astro global)
Provides CSS authoring guidance in output (scope rules or global-prefixed selectors)
Exports: buildSearchQueries, findElement, findClosingLine, detectCommentSyntax
nodes.name: live-wrap.mjs

nodes.label: live.md
observations: Reference: Live variant mode workflow
Total lines: 622, non-empty: 413, 37 sections
Comprehensive live-mode protocol: contract, start, poll loop, recovery
Covers generate/fallback/accept/discard/prefetch/exit/cleanup flows
Includes first-time setup, drift-heal warning, CSP detection, consent prompt template
Troubleshooting section for common issues
Core reference for live-accept.mjs and live-wrap.mjs scripts
nodes.name: reference-live.md

Staggered animations, reduced motion, perceived performance, rendering performance

nodes.label: PDR Review — Sign Language Learning Web Platform
nodes.description: Critique + gap analysis of PDR v1. Covers executive summary, strengths, section-by-section critique, 12 cross-cutting gaps (G1–G12), prioritized recommendations (P0–P2), risk register, and what changed in v2.
nodes.name: doc-pdr-review-01

nodes.label: PDR v2 Refined — Product Design Requirement
nodes.description: Full refined PDR spec. TL;DR, background, goals/non-goals (G1–G5, N1–N4), personas (Hana, Farid, Eli), 6 user stories, MVP/v1/v2 scope matrix, functional requirements (FR-1..FR-5), 10 non-functional requirements (NFR-1..NFR-10), technical architecture (MediaPipe → Transformer/ST-GCN → ONNX Runtime Web), data strategy, privacy/security, accessibility, success metrics, 6-milestone roadmap, risks, glossary.
nodes.name: doc-pdr-review-02

nodes.label: PDR v2 One-Page Summary (HTML)
nodes.description: Visual one-page summary of PDR v2. Cards for description, KPIs (<60s, <300ms, ≥85% acc, ≥95 a11y), personas, architecture, scope-by-release table, privacy/accessibility, fairness, roadmap (M0–M5), and key changes from v1.
nodes.name: doc-pdr-review-03

nodes.label: Epics & User Stories — Jira-Ready Backlog
nodes.description: Decomposed backlog from PDR v2. 17 epics (EPIC-01..EPIC-17), 65 stories/spikes (S-01..S-65, SPK-01..SPK-03), 6 cross-cutting tasks (T-01..T-06), release plan mapped to milestones M1–M5, Given/When/Then acceptance criteria, definitions of ready and done.
nodes.name: doc-pdr-review-04

nodes.label: Skills Lock Configuration
nodes.description: Version 1 skill lock. Locks 'impeccable' skill from GitHub source pbakaus/impeccable with SHA-256 hash e08cc9... for integrity verification.
nodes.name: config-skills-lock

nodes.label: Persona: Hana (hearing learner)
nodes.description: Primary persona — hearing adult learning sign language to communicate with a Deaf colleague.
nodes.name: persona-hana

nodes.label: Persona: Farid (family member)
nodes.description: Parent of a Deaf child, motivated but irregular practice schedule.
nodes.name: persona-farid

nodes.label: Persona: Eli (educator)
nodes.description: Educator assigning practice, v2 persona.
nodes.name: persona-eli

nodes.label: Cross-Cutting Gap Analysis
nodes.description: 12 gaps identified in PDR v1: no personas/user stories (G1), no KPIs (G2), no MVP boundary (G3), no accessibility commitment (G4), no data/privacy (G5), no Deaf community plan (G6), no content plan (G7), no model evaluation (G8), no fairness (G9), no risks section (G10), no roadmap (G11), no analytics loop (G12).
nodes.name: gap-analysis

nodes.label: Recognition Pipeline
nodes.description: MediaPipe Holistic landmarks → MLP for static fingerspelling + sliding-window Transformer/ST-GCN for dynamic signs → ONNX Runtime Web / TF.js, WebGPU when available.
nodes.name: recognition-pipeline

nodes.label: Structured Feedback Taxonomy
nodes.description: Four-component feedback: handshape, location, movement, palm orientation. v2 adds non-manual markers (brow, mouth, head tilt). Confidence-gated verdict avoids false 'wrong' labels.
nodes.name: feedback-taxonomy

nodes.label: Privacy & On-Device Posture
nodes.description: On-device inference by default, no webcam frames or landmarks leave the browser, persistent '🔒 On-device' indicator, opt-in sync/donation, COPPA/FERPA-ready, one-click data deletion.
nodes.name: privacy-posture

nodes.label: 17 Epic Breakdown
nodes.description: EPIC-01 Camera/runtime, EPIC-02 Recognition/feedback, EPIC-03 Lesson UI, EPIC-04 Curriculum/content, EPIC-05 Multi-language, EPIC-06 Accessibility, EPIC-07 Privacy/security, EPIC-08 Onboarding, EPIC-09 Model evaluation, EPIC-10 Trust UX, EPIC-11 Telemetry, EPIC-12 Beta, EPIC-13 Marketing, EPIC-14 NMM scoring, EPIC-15 Educator dashboard, EPIC-16 PWA/offline, EPIC-17 Continuous SLR.
nodes.name: epic-17-map

nodes.label: 6-Milestone Roadmap
nodes.description: M0 Discovery/advisory (4w), M1 Technical spike (4w), M2 MVP build (10w), M3 Closed beta (4w), M4 Public launch (4w), M5 v2 features (rolling).
nodes.name: milestone-map

nodes.label: Batch 16/19 — Config & Data Files
observations: 5 config/data files for signtutor: labels, deployment config, dependencies
3 of 5 listed paths (fingerspell_labels.json, fingerspell_mlp_labels_mlp.json, signtutor/vercel.json) did not exist on disk; mapped to real equivalents
nodes.name: batch-16

nodes.label: signtutor/public/models/dynamic_labels.json
observations: 14-line JSON mapping 8 dynamic ASL gesture labels: HELLO, GOODBYE, YES, NO, PLEASE, THANKS, SORRY, HELP
seq_len=45 frames, feature_dim=126 (21 keypoints × 3 coords × 2 hands)
Used by the dynamic gesture recognition model
nodes.name: dynamic_labels.json

nodes.label: signtutor/public/models/labels.json (v1 fingerspell labels)
observations: 57-line JSON with 24 fingerspell labels (A-Y, no J or Z)
Includes synth_collisions: groups of visually similar letters (e.g. A/E/M/N/S/T)
Likely used by an earlier fingerspell model version (MLP or CNN)
nodes.name: labels.json

nodes.label: signtutor/public/models/labels_v2.json
observations: 84-line JSON with full A-Z fingerspell labels (26 letters)
synth_collisions extended with J/I and Z/D collision groups
feature_dim=68 (geometry-engineered features, not raw keypoints)
geometry_features: index_middle_tip_distance, index_middle_mcp_distance, index_middle_cosine_angle, index_middle_cross_sign, tip_mcp_distance_ratio
hard_classes=[R, U, V, M, N, O] with hard_class_weight=2.25 for loss upweighting
Used by the fingerspell MLP v2 model
nodes.name: labels_v2.json

nodes.label: vercel.json (project root)
observations: 3-line Vercel deployment config
Sets rootDirectory to 'signtutor' so Vercel knows where the Next.js app lives
nodes.name: vercel.json

nodes.label: signtutor/package.json
observations: 38-line Node.js manifest for signtutor v0.1.0 (private)
Framework: Next.js 16.2.6, React 19.2.4, TypeScript 5
Key runtime dep: onnxruntime-web ^1.26.0 (on-device ML inference)
Testing: vitest ^4.1.6 (unit), @playwright/test ^1.60.0 (E2E)
Linters: eslint 9, eslint-config-next 16.2.6
Styling: tailwindcss 4, @tailwindcss/postcss 4
nodes.name: package.json

nodes.label: Dynamic Gesture Labels (8 words)
observations: 8 ASL phrase/word labels: HELLO, GOODBYE, YES, NO, PLEASE, THANKS, SORRY, HELP
Model input: 45-frame sequence, 126-dim feature vector per frame
Temporal model (likely LSTM/GRU or Transformer)
nodes.name: dynamic

nodes.label: Static Fingerspell Labels v1 (A-Y, 24 letters)
observations: 24 letters A through Y (no J, no Z)
5 synth_collision groups for data augmentation ambiguity handling
Used by earlier static fingerspell model
nodes.name: static-v1

nodes.label: Static Fingerspell Labels v2 (A-Z, 26 letters)
observations: Full 26-letter ASL alphabet
7 synth_collision groups including J/I and Z/D
5 geometry features extracted from finger landmarks
6 hard classes with 2.25× loss weighting
Engineered features (not raw keypoints) → feature_dim=68
Used by fingerspell_mlp_v2.onnx
nodes.name: static-v2

nodes.label: Next.js 16.2.6 + React 19.2.4
observations: Next.js 16.2.6 with React 19.2.4 and React DOM 19.2.4
TypeScript 5, strict mode, bundler module resolution
Path alias @/* → ./src/*
nodes.name: nextjs

nodes.label: onnxruntime-web ^1.26.0
observations: On-device ML inference via ONNX Runtime Web
Runs fingerspell and dynamic gesture models in browser
Key enabler for privacy-preserving local inference
nodes.name: onnxruntime

nodes.label: Testing Stack (Vitest + Playwright + jsdom)
observations: Vitest ^4.1.6 with @vitejs/plugin-react ^6.0.1 for unit/integration tests
@testing-library/react ^16.3.2 + @testing-library/jest-dom ^6.9.1
jsdom ^29.1.1 for DOM environment
@playwright/test ^1.60.0 + playwright ^1.60.0 for E2E
test:e2e script configured
nodes.name: testing

nodes.label: Vercel Deployment Config
observations: rootDirectory: signtutor — Vercel builds from the signtutor/ subdirectory
Monorepo-friendly layout
nodes.name: vercel

nodes.label: Files Checked — 3 Missing
observations: fingerspell_labels.json — NOT FOUND at listed path; closest real file is labels.json (v1, 24 letters A-Y)
fingerspell_mlp_labels_mlp.json — NOT FOUND at listed path; closest real files are fingerspell_mlp.onnx / fingerspell_mlp_v2.onnx (binary models) and labels_v2.json (label spec)
signtutor/vercel.json — NOT FOUND; vercel.json exists at project root D:\signlanguage\vercel.json instead

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: SignTutor is a browser-based sign language learning platform with on-device ML inference using MediaPipe and ONNX

tour.title: Core Application
tour.description: Next.js app with fingerspelling lessons, word practice, and gesture settings pages

tour.title: Shared Library
tour.description: Core logic for landmark normalization, sequence features, curriculum, and local storage

tour.title: ML Training Pipeline
tour.description: Python scripts for training fingerspell MLP and dynamic sign Transformer models with ONNX export

tour.title: CI/CD and Infrastructure
tour.description: GitHub Actions workflows for ML and frontend gates, verification, and deployment

project.name: signlanguage
project.description: A browser-based, vision-driven sign language learning platform with on-device inference.
